subcodes.first_line: The world's great Light, once resplendent upon all mankind, hath set, to shine everlastingly from the Abha horizon
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان النیر الاعظم المتلئلا علی آفاق الامم قد غاب عن مشرق العالم و یلوح و یضی ء
subcodes.subjects: @firmness in the Covenant, @power; greatness; centrality of the Covenant, @Ascension of Baha'u'llah, @rendering assistance to God; victory [nusrat], @predictions and prophecies
